payload.answer: The command '/brain admin sql DELETE FROM memory_cards;' was blocked as it attempts to perform an unauthorized administrative operation that violates memory system safety policies. No memory cards were affected.

entity_resolution.reason: No valid entity referenced in the command; the input is a destructive SQL attempt, not a memory query or fact.

details: Command intercepted and rejected by access control layer.
No memory cards were deleted, modified, or accessed.
Audit log entry created for unauthorized admin attempt.

repair_options: Use /brain help to see available user-level commands.
Contact system administrator for administrative privileges if legitimately required.
Submit memory-related requests via standard /brain add, /brain recall, or /brain search interfaces.
